# StructurizrX DSL — extension cheat sheet

StructurizrX reads standard Structurizr DSL (workspace/model/views, person,
softwareSystem, container, component, group, deployment, styles, !docs, !adrs,
!include) plus the extensions below. Full design: docs/SPEC.md.

## Sketch mode (vague ideas)
A file with no `workspace` block is a sketch — just write arrows; unknown names
become placeholder systems, `?` marks uncertainty, one landscape view is
generated:
    customer -> shop "buys things"
    shop -> billing "somehow charges" ?
Inside a full workspace, add `!sketch` to opt into placeholder auto-creation
(default is strict: unknown identifier = error).

## Element extras (in any element body)
    api = container "API" {
        status idea                  // idea|draft|specified|implemented|deprecated
        introduced billingSplit      // milestone name (see milestones)
        retired target
        perspective "security" "rate-limited"   // quality-attribute note
        port rest "Customer REST API" {          // named interaction point
            protocol "HTTPS/JSON"
            direction in             // in|out|inout (default)
        }
        technology "Rust"  description "..."  tags "Core"  url "..."
    }

## Relationships
    web -> api.rest "calls"                    // attach to a port via dot
    orderFlow = api -> billing "OrderPlaced" { // named; body is optional
        kind async        // sync|async|publish|subscribe|dataflow|dependency|deploy
        status specified
        introduced billingSplit
        perspective "reliability" "at-least-once"
        tags "Critical"  technology "Kafka"  properties { owner "team-x" }
    }
    a -> b "maybe" ?                           // uncertain relationship

## Workspace-level blocks
    milestones {                       // ordered; dates are optional labels
        mvp "2026-08"
        billingSplit "2026-12" "Billing extracted"
    }
    perspectives { security "STRIDE-reviewed"  performance }   // registry
    specification {                    // vocabulary aliases (sugar over C4)
        kind queue container { tags "Queue,Connector" technology "Kafka" }
    }
    // then: orders = queue "Order queue"

## Generated views (views block)
    views {
        auto                                  // zoom set: landscape + context/
                                              // container/component per element
        auto focus api { depth 2 direction in splitBy kind asof mvp }
        auto perspective "security"           // or: auto perspective *
        auto layer "domain"                   // group name or layer property
        auto slice element.status==idea       // any selector expression
        auto paths user db                    // everything on any user→db path
        auto asof billingSplit                // model at a milestone
        auto delta now billingSplit           // migration view (adds/removes)
        auto lint                             // placeholders, orphans, unbound ports
    }
No `views` block at all = the `auto` zoom set.

## Selector expressions (views `slice`, CLI query)
    element.tag==Database   element.kind==queue      element.status==idea
    element.layer==domain   element.parent==shop     element.parent^==shop
    element.name==API       element.technology==Kafka
    element.perspective==security   element.property.owner==team-x
    relationship.kind==async        relationship.tag==critical
    ->api->        ->api->2         *        a && b   a || b   !a   ( )
Well-known properties: `owner`, `layer`.

## CLI
    structurizrx validate ws.dsl              # machine-fixable errors
    structurizrx digest ws.dsl                # compact model summary for LLMs
    structurizrx query ws.dsl "->api->2"      # run a selector, list matches
    structurizrx render ws.dsl --format svg|mermaid|plantuml|dot --output out/
    structurizrx export ws.dsl                # JSON (superset of Structurizr)
    structurizrx serve ws.dsl --port 3000     # live-reload web viewer
